completed_tasks: MCP stderr fix: use TokioChildProcess::builder().stderr(null) instead of configure closure
TUI ESC cancel: add is_thinking check so Thinking spinner stops on ESC
TUI panic hook: restore terminal on panic to prevent garbled screen
TUI terminal restore: use let _ instead of ? to ensure all restore steps execute
Stdin isolation: prevent child processes (bash, grep, find, python, nodejs, shell, sandbox) from stealing terminal stdin
Raw mode defense: re-enable raw_mode on agent Completed/Done/Error events
Table rendering: dynamic column width + HTML tag cleaning for Chinese text
UTF-8 safe truncation: prevent boundary panic in web_search, file_read, CLI preview, TUI tool display
Qwen XML tool call recovery: parse XML-style tool calls from non-standard LLM outputs
Custom slash commands: .md files from .octo/commands/ loaded as /command-name with autocomplete
Builtin commands: 10 embedded commands (review, explain, refactor, test, fix, doc, optimize, summarize, translate, commit) via include_dir!
phase_name: MCP Support + TUI Robustness + Custom Commands
